  pool: tank
 state: DEGRADED
status: One or more devices could not be used because the label is missing or
        invalid.
config:

	NAME          STATE     READ WRITE CKSUM
	tank          DEGRADED     0     0     0
	  /dev/sda    ONLINE       0     0     0
	  /dev/sdb    FAULTED      1     0     2  too many errors

  pool: backup
 state: ONLINE
config:

	NAME          STATE     READ WRITE CKSUM
	backup        ONLINE       0     0     0
	  /dev/sdc    ONLINE       0     0     0
